semantic.role: CLI command entry point for executing usage reports.
responsibilities: Defines the command-line interface options for the usage command via the ExecuteUsageCommandOptions interface.
Delegates execution to the usage engine (runUsageReport) with the provided root directory and default runtime I/O.
outOfScope: Pipeline or persistence logic (belongs in engines, services, core, or infra).
Business logic for generating usage reports.
invariants: Must remain a thin adapter, delegating all substantive work to the usage engine.
Must not absorb pipeline, persistence, or business logic from engines or infra.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Separate CLI command routing from core logic to keep runtime behavior reusable and testable outside the CLI.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; unrelated to the commit 'feat: restore llm-authored markdown generation'.
